name: GOLFTEC Fort Myers
address: 14261 S Tamiami Trl Unit 7, Fort Myers, FL 33912
about: GOLFTEC Fort Myers is a dedicated golf training facility that focuses on technology-driven coaching and club fitting services. The center utilizes advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION and high-speed video analysis to provide data-driven feedback to golfers of all skill levels. Instruction is personalized, with coaches creating custom game plans based on an initial Swing Evaluation, and the facility offers services that include on-course lessons, practice memberships, and custom club fitting with access to equipment from top golf brands.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Personalized coaching with PGA-certified professionals for a customized improvement plan
Indoor simulator and launch monitor technology for year-round practice in any weather

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as part of the practice technology suite with launch monitors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and custom club fitting services to help you find the perfect equipment for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink service, but it does not specify a policy on outside food and drinks. It's best to contact the center directly to confirm.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Using the simulator technology, players can typically complete a full 18 holes in 60-90 minutes, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC Fort Myers caters to juniors and youth with its coaching programs and technology-focused approach to learning the game, making it a suitable environment for young golfers.
